visual_description: The man in a brown suit rides a bicycle along a dusty rural road, then dismounts and walks away from the bike. He proceeds down the road, passing a white pickup truck parked beside a metal‑sided building, and heads toward an open doorway.
audio_description: Ambient outdoor sounds are audible, including faint bicycle and footstep noises.
